name: HOG WHISPERER

abilities.name: Combat Finesse
abilities.text: When this model is targeted with a (melee) action, the attacking model's duel cannot be cheated.

abilities.name: Swineherd
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may remove a Remains or enemy Scheme marker within 2". If it does so, allies within (y)2" of this model gain a Glutted token.

actions.name: Pig Sticker
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives a (-) if another ally is engaging the target.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Grease and Gristle
triggers.text: Make an enemy Remains marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Herd 'Em
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. This model may remove a Glutted token from the target.
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp. If a Glutted token was removed, the target may declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: Purification
triggers.text: Remove a token from the target.

actions.name: "Here Pig!"
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a Remains or Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Place an ally within 4" of this model into base contact with the target, then the ally removes the target.

extraction_notes: The melee icon in Combat Finesse text is represented as (melee)
The (y) in Swineherd likely represents a range icon type - preserved as (y) for accuracy
